chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-941 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.03.2022 Mr. Muhammad Aamir Qureshi advocate for petitioners. ----- The petitioners seek withdrawal of this petition on the count that they would pursue their remedy under the law. Although this petition is likely to be dismissed on account of laches but since it is being withdrawn we dismiss it accordingly as being withdrawn along with pending applications. However, we do not approve the appearance of the petitioners before the grievance redressal committee as requested in the application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
